tools.name: searchanalytics.webmastersSearchanalyticsQuery
tools.description: Query your data with filters and parameters that you define. Returns zero or more rows grouped by the row keys that you define. You must define a date range of one or more days. When date is one of the group by values, any days without data are omitted from the result list. If you need to know which days have data, issue a broad date range query grouped by date for any metric, and see which day rows are returned.

tools.name: sitemaps.webmastersSitemapsDelete
tools.description: Deletes a sitemap from the Sitemaps report. Does not stop Google from crawling this sitemap or the URLs that were previously crawled in the deleted sitemap.

tools.name: sitemaps.webmastersSitemapsGet
tools.description: Retrieves information about a specific sitemap.

tools.name: sitemaps.webmastersSitemapsList
tools.description: Lists the [sitemaps-entries](/webmaster-tools/v3/sitemaps) submitted for this site, or included in the sitemap index file (if `sitemapIndex` is specified in the request).

tools.name: sitemaps.webmastersSitemapsSubmit
tools.description: Submits a sitemap for a site.

tools.name: sites.webmastersSitesAdd
tools.description: Adds a site to the set of the user's sites in Search Console.

tools.name: sites.webmastersSitesDelete
tools.description: Removes a site from the set of the user's Search Console sites.

tools.name: sites.webmastersSitesList
tools.description: Lists the user's Search Console sites.

tools.name: urlTestingTools.searchconsoleUrlTestingToolsMobileFriendlyTestRun
tools.description: Runs Mobile-Friendly Test for a given URL.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
